creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Host running CURRENT (FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #9 main-n268489-d646dca3bc1b: Thu Feb 22 20:55:43 CET 2024 amd64), ports tree is up to date.

Trying to install and/or update port textproc/xmlcatmgr fails with the error shown below:

===>  Patching for docbook-xml-5.0_3
===>   docbook-xml-5.0_3 depends on file: /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent/catalog.xml - found
===>   docbook-xml-5.0_3 depends on executable: xmlcatmgr - not found
===>  Installing for xmlcatmgr-2.2_4
===>   Registering installation for xmlcatmgr-2.2_4 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/textproc/xmlcatmgr/work/stage/usr/local/share/xml/:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/textproc/xmlcatmgr/work/stage/usr/local/share/sgml/:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
